def solve(nums, k)
  total_sum = nums.sum
  prefix = 0
  dp_prev = 0
  max_val = {0 => 0}
  nums.each do |num|
    prefix += num
    mod = prefix % k
    current_max = max_val[mod] || -Float::INFINITY
    dp_current = [dp_prev, prefix + current_max].max
    new_val = dp_current - prefix
    if max_val.key?(mod)
      if new_val > max_val[mod]
        max_val[mod] = new_val
      end
    else
      max_val[mod] = new_val
    end
    dp_prev = dp_current
  end
  total_sum - dp_prev
end
```
